channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 10 com severidade Alta
• 26 novas CVEs
• 2 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-40089 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.9
Resumo:
Sonicverse is a Self-hosted Docker Compose stack for live radio streaming. The Sonicverse Radio Audio Streaming Stack dashboard contains a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in its API client (apps/dashboard/lib/api.ts). Installations created using the provided install.sh script (including the one‑liner bash <(curl -fsSL https://sonicverse.short.gy/install-audiostack)) are affected. In these deployments...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40089
 
🚨 CVE-2026-4498 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.7
Resumo:
Execution with Unnecessary Privileges (CWE-250) in Kibana’s Fleet plugin debug route handlers can lead reading index data beyond their direct Elasticsearch RBAC scope via Privilege Abuse (CAPEC-122). This requires an authenticated Kibana user with Fleet sub-feature privileges (such as agents, agent policies, and settings management).
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4498
 
🚨 CVE-2026-5501 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
wolfSSL_X509_verify_cert in the OpenSSL compatibility layer accepts a certificate chain in which the leaf's signature is not checked, if the attacker supplies an untrusted intermediate with Basic Constraints `CA:FALSE` that is legitimately signed by a trusted root. An attacker who obtains any leaf certificate from a trusted CA (e.g. a free DV cert from Let's Encrypt) can forge a certificate for any subject name with...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-5501
 
📰 How VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) Training Helps Keep Top Tech Talent in APJ
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A fierce competition for elite tech talent is underway in the Asia-Pacific and Japan (APJ) region. With some of the world’s largest tech talent markets, retaining experts is often the single biggest competitive advantage. The concern is real: a 2025 ISACA study reveals that 74% of organizations are worried about retention, with a third of …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/09/how-vmware-cloud-foundation-vcf-training-helps-keep-top-tech-talent-in-apj/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Marimo RCE Flaw CVE-2026-39987 Exploited Within 10 Hours of Disclosure
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.3
Resumo:
A critical security vulnerability in Marimo, an open-source Python notebook for data science and analysis, has been exploited within 10 hours of public disclosure, according to findings from Sysdig. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-39987 (CVSS score: 9.3), a pre-authenticated remote code execution vulnerability impacting all versions of Marimo prior to and including
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/marimo-rce-flaw-cve-2026-39987.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-33092 - Acronis
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Acronis
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Local privilege escalation due to improper handling of environment variables. The following products are affected: Acronis True Image OEM (macOS) before build 42571, Acronis True Image (macOS) before build 42902.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33092
 
💣 Analysis of one billion CISA KEV remediation records exposes limits of human-scale security
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Analysis of 1 billion CISA KEV remediation records reveal a breaking point for human-scale security. Qualys shows most critical flaws are exploited before defenders can patch them.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/analysis-of-one-billion-cisa-kev-remediation-records-exposes-limits-of-human-scale-security/
 
📰 Healthcare IT solutions provider ChipSoft hit by ransomware attack
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Dutch healthcare software vendor ChipSoft has been impacted by a ransomware attack that forced the company to take offline its website and digital services for patients and healthcare providers.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/healthcare-it-solutions-provider-chipsoft-hit-by-ransomware-attack/
 
📰 New ‘LucidRook’ malware used in targeted attacks on NGOs, universities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A new Lua-based malware, called LucidRook, is being used in spear-phishing campaigns targeting non-governmental organizations and universities in Taiwan.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-lucidrook-malware-used-in-targeted-attacks-on-ngos-universities/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-39974 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.5
Resumo:
n8n-MCP is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides AI assistants with comprehensive access to n8n node documentation, properties, and operations. Prior to 2.47.4, an authenticated Server-Side Request Forgery in n8n-mcp allows a caller holding a valid AUTH_TOKEN to cause the server to issue HTTP requests to arbitrary URLs supplied through multi-tenant HTTP headers. Response bodies are reflected back throug...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-39974
 
🚨 USN-8165-1: Linux kernel (Azure FIPS) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Qualys discovered that several vulnerabilities existed in the AppArmor Linux kernel Security Module (LSM). An unprivileged local attacker could use these issues to load, replace, and remove arbitrary AppArmor profiles causing denial of service, exposure of sensitive information (kernel memory), local privilege escalation, or possibly escape a container. (LP: #2143853, CVE-2026-23268, CVE-2026-23269, CVE-2026-23403, C...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8165-1
 
🚨 USN-8145-4: Linux kernel (HWE) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - ARM64 architecture; - Cryptographic API; - UDF file system; - NFC subsystem; - Network traffic control; (CVE-2024-46777, CVE-2025-21735, CVE-2025-37849, CVE-2026-23060, CVE-2026-23074)
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8145-4
 
🚨 USN-8154-2: Django vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
This update provides the corresponding updates for Ubuntu 14.04 LTS and Ubuntu 16.04 LTS. Original advisory details: Seokchan Yoon discovered that Django incorrectly handled copying memory when parsing multipart uploads with excessive whitespace. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Django to use excessive resources, leading to a denial of service. (CVE-2026-33033) It was discovered that Django di...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8154-2
 
🚨 CVE-2026-0811 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.4
Resumo:
The Advanced Contact form 7 DB plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 2.0.9. This is due to missing or incorrect nonce validation on the 'vsz_cf7_save_setting_callback' function. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to delete form entry via a forged request granted they can trick a site administrator into performing an action such as clic...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-0811
 
💣 Mythos autonomously exploited vulnerabilities that survived 27 years of human review. Security teams need a new detection playbook - Venturebeat
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Mythos autonomously exploited vulnerabilities that survived 27 years of human review.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijgFBVV95cUxNX0owTXlDVi1odWRoSktqNUZ3NGlnTm5ZaF80OUZ1b1FqcHJudDk2RDFoZHUtTFZOcDNqXzVGZVZWWjdTakY0ZjB2YmRjOTh3Mk9VM3o2ak9FNFk3MUNCTm5TYS0zaUR0WVpqQTdQaWlrdlV2Z1ZCX3U1QkswMlpGYkotekNuLXdkdS1vczRn?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 08/04/2026 até 10/04/2026.
